channel.title: obt on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes
channel.description: Recent content in obt on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes

item.title: Off The Beaten Track
item.description: I submitted a talk entitled Type-Driven Development of Security Protocols to Off-The-Beaten-Track ‘17. I have decided to uploaded the abstract here so that my attempt is a least indexable by the great machine spirit in the web—Hallowed be thy API. Given time I will also upload a copy of the paper to ArXiV. The abstract is: Implementing security protocols correctly is hard; verifying them is too. However, we also implement them in languages different to those we verify them in.
